meaning: n.加维驳船(美国新泽西州沿海的一种小船)
examples: Thus far, Garvey has yet to bring his invention to market.

As Guy Garvey of Elbow writes, you don't want to feel better with a jolly tune when you're heartbroken.
And that you know they cite Garvey and others as being inspirational to them.
